'''SGI Systems, Inc.''' was a [[Megacorporation/Legends|megacorporation]] headquartered on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Druckenwell/Legends|Druckenwell]] with diverse holdings. They were also know for producing [[Assassin droid/Legends|assassin droid]] matrixes and mission specific components for the [[Black market/Legends|black market]]. Shortly after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], the
[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] nationalized the company alongside [[Bansche Tech/Legends|Bansche Tech]], [[Reiber Manufacturing]], and [[Sencil Corporation]].<ref name="GNN6" /> The four companies were reformed as the [[Imperial Droid Corporation]].<ref name="PP" />
